articles.title: Keir Starmer: 'I'm fed up' with Trump and Putin affecting UK energy costs
articles.body: Iran effectively closed the Strait of Hormuz during the war with U.S. and Israel, creating an oil supply crunch and sending global energy prices soaring.

articles.title: UK's Starmer says Iran conflict shows Britain must take a new path - Reuters

articles.title: The Strait of Hormuz is not open as Iran controls access after ceasefire, UAE oil CEO says
articles.body: Sultan Ahmed Al Jaber demanded a full reopening of the Strait, warning that the oil supply disruption will increase if Iran maintains control of the passage.
